user_query:
We’re evaluating three B2B SaaS support-tooling targets on the buy side. Please read input/targets.csv and input/targets_details.json and deliver the following outputs under output/:

1) Screening scorecards: Build a weighted screening scorecard using these 8 criteria and weights — Strategic fit 20%, Revenue quality 15%, Growth rate 15%, Gross margin 10%, Customer retention 10%, Technology/IP moat 10%, Team quality 10%, Integration complexity 10%. Rate each criterion 1–10, compute a weighted_score on a 0–10 scale, and assign a decision using these thresholds: weighted_score ≥7.0 = Go, 5.0–6.9 = Conditional, <5.0 = Pass. Save as output/screening/scorecards.csv with columns exactly: target, strategic_fit, revenue_quality, growth_rate, gross_margin, customer_retention, technology_moat, team_quality, integration_complexity, weighted_score, decision.

2) Valuation triangulation: For each target, provide (a) a revenue multiple approach using SaaS bands where growth≥30% and NRR≥100% → 8–15x ARR, otherwise 4–8x ARR (include applied_multiple and valuation), (b) a 5-year DCF with discount_rate between 0.15–0.25, terminal_growth_rate < discount_rate, yearly_fcfs (array of 5 numbers), terminal_value, present_value, and enterprise_value, and (c) a comparable-transactions approach with an applied_multiple and valuation. Save a single JSON at output/valuation/triangulation.json keyed by target name with fields: revenue_multiple, dcf, comps, and final_recommended_valuation.

3) Due diligence: Create a checklist with at least 65 items distributed as Financial (30), Legal (15), Operational (12), HR/Culture (8). Save as output/diligence/checklist.csv with columns: category, item, priority, assigned_to, status.

4) Red flags: From the inputs, detect red flags per target for: revenue decline >10% YoY, key customer contract expiring within 12 months, founder unwilling to transition, deprecated/unsupported technology, and employee turnover >30%. Save as output/diligence/red_flags.json.

5) Deal structure: Recommend a deal structure per target and earnout design if used. Save as output/deal/deal_structure.json with fields per target: chosen_structure (one of: asset_purchase, stock_purchase, merger) and earnout { used, metric, duration_months, cap_percent }. If earnout is used, keep duration ≤24 months and cap ≤30%.

6) Integration plan: Draft a 100-day integration plan with distinct sections for Day 1-7, Day 8-30, Day 31-60, Day 61-100. Save as output/integration/100_day_plan.md.

Please keep assumptions explicit in your files where needed and tie your Go/Conditional/Pass decisions and deal-structure choices to the data provided.
